args.query: SELECT AVG(rating) AS avg_rating, COUNT(*) AS total_reviews FROM review WHERE business_ref IN ('businessref_36','businessref_40','businessref_44','businessref_67','businessref_77','businessref_82','businessref_86','businessref_89','businessref_9','businessref_92','businessref_97');

exec_args.sql: SELECT AVG(rating) AS avg_rating, COUNT(*) AS total_reviews FROM review WHERE business_ref IN ('businessref_36','businessref_40','businessref_44','businessref_67','businessref_77','businessref_82','businessref_86','businessref_89','businessref_9','businessref_92','businessref_97');
